system.label: Room booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Overnight and drive-in room requests pile up on Messenger — see tonight's occupancy and confirm stays without double-booking.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (themed rooms, gallery, about, FAQ, contact), basic SEO, Netlify hosting. Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial sent 2026-07-21 via outreachSchedule; auto follow-ups 3d1w max 4. Email: luckydriveinnhotel@gmail.com.

sources.intro: Lucky Drive Inn Hotel is the first drive Inn hotel in Rodriguez Rizal
sources.address: Don Mariano Ave., San Jose, Rodriguez, Rizal, Philippines, 1860
sources.notes: Assets from FB Photos + cover/logo (Chrome DevTools inspect + download). Themed guest rooms with murals; yellow promo banner kept as brand asset.
